title: IQ-ME Assessment Session State (v2)

version.description: Schema version tag (Story 12-2 v1→v2 migration). v1 was implicit; v2 makes version explicit and adds methodology + variant for the multi-test battery (PR-15). enum (not const) so the vendored subset validator in tests/contract/_state-schema-check.mjs enforces it.

startedAt.description: Unix ms; serialization-only — runtime ceremony uses performance.now() in iqme:reveal-stage payload

seed.description: 128-bit hex from crypto.getRandomValues(); in-memory only per FR7

methodology.description: Selected methodology (Story 12-2 selector). 'geometric' = the existing ICAR Matrix Reasoning test (default); 'letter-number' = ICAR Letter/Number Series (Story 12-4).

variant.description: Selected depth: short (fewer items) or full (more items, tighter SE). Story 12-2 selector; engine in Story 12-3.

$comment: v2 contract (Story 12-2). version is now a required const 'v2'. methodology + variant are optional (present once the user passes the selection scene; absent in a bare reset state, which is still valid). additionalProperties:false preserved. Related: docs/adr/iqme-reveal-stage-event-contract.md.
